title: Goodyear Car Windscreen Demister Pad Micro Fibre Sponge For Mirror Window Glass Fog Remover
features: Ideal for removing water and mist from windscreens during foggy weather.
Restores clear vision for improved driving safety - Winter essential
Super Absorbent microfibre material Naturally gentle and safe for all surfaces
Use on any surface for a lint free shine
Streak-free and scratch-free finish. Easily washable
description: The Goodyear Demister Pad is an essential tool for drivers seeking a clear, unobstructed view on the road. Designed to enhance safety, this high-quality pad effectively removes mist, fog, and condensation from all types of surfaces. Its advanced microfiber technology ensures that your windshield and mirrors remain crystal clear, improving visibility in all driving conditions. Crafted with a naturally gentle formula, the Demister Pad is safe for use on all surfaces, including glass, mirrors, and screens. Whether you're dealing with the early morning fog or a sudden rainstorm, this pad provides a reliable solution for maintaining a clear and unobstructed view. The non-abrasive design prevents damage, making it perfect for everyday use. Achieve a streak-free and scratch-free finish with every use. The Goodyear Demister Pad’s specialized fibers work efficiently to lift away moisture without leaving behind any marks or residue. This ensures a spotless surface, free from smudges or streaks, allowing you to drive with confidence. The versatile design of the Demister Pad means it can be used on any surface, including windows, mirrors, and screens. Its lint-free properties guarantee a clean, polished look without any leftover fibers. Keep your vehicle looking pristine and well-maintained with this all-purpose cleaning tool. The compact and lightweight design of the Demister Pad makes it easy to store in your car for convenient access whenever you need it.
